# Intent: User Onboarding

## Stakeholders
- Product: Jane Smith — reduce time-to-value for new users

## Goal
Enable new users to register and start using the product within 5 minutes.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] Users can register with email and password
- [ ] Email verification is required before access

## Constraints
- Must comply with GDPR data handling requirements

## Behaviours <!-- taproot-managed -->
- [Register Account](./register-account/usecase.md)
- [Choose Plan](./choose-plan/usecase.md)

## Status
- **State:** active
- **Created:** 2024-01-15
- **Last reviewed:** 2024-03-01

## Notes
Primary onboarding flow. SSO login tracked separately.
